events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! Which Beatles track featuring Ringo on vocals is your all-time favourite?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's incomparable guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite Brian May guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger's Energy
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in the USA
events.blurb: 45 years ago today, MTV launched in the United States, revolutionising music television with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star, or just give us more to love?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which would have been 32 years ago this month.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! What's your top track from their game-changing debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, an iconic event of the 1960s counterculture, began 57 years ago today in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years since the mud, music, and magic of Woodstock began. If you could have been there, which artist would you have most wanted to see?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley.

angles.name: The King Lives On
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His music defined an era and continues to captivate. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years on. His impact on music and culture is undeniable. What's your most played Tupac track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away, he would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Jimi's Enduring Sound
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after his passing. His guitar work changed everything. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released on September 26, 1969, making it 57 years old this month.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Celebrating 57 years of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'! That iconic cover, those timeless tracks. Which song from the album is always on your playlist?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are unmistakable. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Our Kid's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment or track?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, and later as a UK single reissue on October 24, 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 'Imagine' was released this month 55 years ago (US single). A song that still resonates globally. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: 25 years ago, Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry our music.

angles.name: iPod's 25th
angles.copy: Remember '1,000 songs in your pocket'? The first iPod was announced 25 years ago this month. Did you have one? What was on your playlist?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the 64th anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years of 007. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles co-founder and peace activist John Lennon.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His vision and music continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?
